test_cases.query: What accuracy does GPT-4 achieve on the MMLU benchmark?

expected.contradiction_note: Different papers report 86.4% vs 90% depending on evaluation setup

test_cases.query: Does chain-of-thought prompting improve reasoning in large language models?

expected.contradiction_note: Broad consensus exists — good test for zero-contradiction path

test_cases.query: What are the energy consumption differences between training GPT-3 and GPT-4?

expected.contradiction_note: Estimates vary widely due to undisclosed OpenAI figures

test_cases.query: How does retrieval-augmented generation compare to fine-tuning for domain adaptation?

expected.contradiction_note: Papers disagree on which approach generalises better

test_cases.query: What is the parameter count of Llama 2 and how does it compare to GPT-3?

expected.contradiction_note: Parameter counts are published — tests factual retrieval accuracy

per_test_case.claim_extraction: 1 point — all must_contain_claims appear in extracted claims
per_test_case.contradiction_accuracy: 1 point — correctly detected or correctly absent
per_test_case.report_quality: 1 point — LLM judge scores report coherence >= 7/10

eval_scoring.llm_judge_prompt: Rate this research report on coherence, factual accuracy, and citation quality from 1-10. Return JSON: {"score": N, "reason": "one sentence"}
